# AI Context for @json-express/plugin-devcert

Automatically provisions local SSL certificates for HTTPS during development.

## Setup
```typescript
import { PluginDevcert } from '@json-express/plugin-devcert';
kernel.register(new PluginDevcert());
```

## AI Instruction
- This intercepts the Transport server start and binds it to HTTPS.
- Do not attempt to use this in production; it is for local development only.
